subject: Icibemba
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lumbulapo imibele ya Litilica yakulandafye isano?
topics: Muli uyu mutwe, abasambi balasambilila pali Litilica iyalembwa,
balalondolola ubupilibulo bwa Litilica iyalembwa. Balaishiba Litilica
yalembwa umo abela elyo balabiika Litilica yalembwa mumabumba
